traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Accustomed to life underground, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to the origin of stonework, you are considered proficient in the History skill and add double your proficiency bonus to the check, instead of your normal proficiency bonus.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

traits.name: Dwarven Armor Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.description: Your darkvision has a radius of 120 feet.

traits.name: Duergar Resilience
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, spells, and illusions, as well as to resist being charmed or paralyzed.

traits.name: Duergar Magic
traits.description: When you reach 3rd level, you can cast the enlarge/reduce spell on yourself once with this trait, using only the spell's enlarge option. When you reach 5th level, you can cast the invisibility spell on yourself once with this trait. You don't need material components for either spell, and you can't cast them while you're in direct sunlight. You regain the ability to cast these spells when you finish a long rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Accustomed to twilit forests and the night sky, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply, remaining semiconscious, for 4 hours a day. After resting in this way, you gain the same benefit that a human does from 8 hours of sleep.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.description: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.description: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.description: Your base walking speed increases to 35 feet.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, and other natural phenomena.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.description: Your darkvision has a radius of 120 feet.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: You have disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight when you, the target of your attack, or whatever you are trying to perceive is in direct sunlight.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.description: You know the dancing lights cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast the faerie fire spell once per day. When you reach 5th level, you can also cast the darkness spell once per day. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Drow Weapon Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with rapiers, shortswords, and hand crossbows.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: Fey Step
traits.description: You can cast the misty step spell once using this trait. You regain the ability to do so when you finish a short or long rest.

traits.name: Sea Elf Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the spear, trident, light crossbow, and net.

traits.name: Child of the Sea
traits.description: You have a swimming speed of 30 feet, and you can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Friend of the Sea
traits.description: Using gestures and sounds, you can communicate simple ideas with any beast that has an innate swimming speed.

traits.name: Necrotic Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to necrotic damage.

traits.name: Blessing of the Raven Queen
traits.description: As a bonus action, you can magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a long rest. Starting at 3rd level, you also gain resistance to all damage when you teleport using this trait.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.description: Highly adaptable, gaining a bonus language and being widely versatile in all fields of life.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Choose one type of dragon from the Draconic Ancestry table. Your breath weapon and damage resistance are determined by the dragon type.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: You can use your action to exhale destructive energy. Your draconic ancestry determines the size, shape, and damage type of the exhalation (DC = 8 + CON modifier + Proficiency). On a failed save, a creature takes 2d6 damage (scales with level).

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your draconic ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.description: You know the minor illusion cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.description: Through sounds and gestures, you can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices, you can add twice your proficiency bonus.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.description: You have proficiency with artisan's tools (tinker's tools). Using them, you can spend 1 hour and 10 gp to construct a Tiny clockwork device.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Thanks to your elf blood, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 60 feet.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 60 feet.

traits.name: Menacing
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.description: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the critical hit.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Thanks to your infernal heritage, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 60 feet.

traits.name: Hellish Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.description: You know the thaumaturgy cantrip. At 3rd level, you can cast hellish rebuke as a 2nd-level spell once per long rest. At 5th level, you can cast darkness once per long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Flight
traits.description: You have a flying speed of 50 feet. To use this speed, you can't be wearing medium or heavy armor.

traits.name: Talons
traits.description: You are proficient with your unarmed strikes, which deal 1d4 slashing damage on a hit.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.description: Your darkvision has a radius of 120 feet.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

traits.name: Stone Camouflage
traits.description: You have advantage on Dexterity (stealth) checks to hide in rocky terrain.

traits.name: Elemental Origin
traits.description: Heirs to elemental power, manifesting different traits based on your planar subrace.

traits.name: Unending Breath
traits.description: You can hold your breath indefinitely while you're not incapacitated.

traits.name: Mingle with the Wind
traits.description: You can cast the levitate spell once with this trait, requiring no material components, and you regain the ability to cast it this way when you finish a long rest. Constitution is your spellcasting ability for this spell.

traits.name: Earth Walk
traits.description: You can move across difficult terrain made of earth or stone without expending extra movement.

traits.name: Merge with Stone
traits.description: You can cast the pass without trace spell once with this trait, requiring no material components, and you regain the ability to cast it this way when you finish a long rest. Constitution is your spellcasting ability for this spell.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. Everything you see in darkness is in a shade of red.

traits.name: Fire Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Reach to the Blaze
traits.description: You know the produce flame cantrip. Once you reach 3rd level, you can cast the burning hands spell once with this trait as a 1st-level spell. Constitution is your spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Acid Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to acid damage.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: You can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Swim speed
traits.description: You have a swim speed of 30 feet.

traits.name: Call to the Wave
traits.description: You know the shape water cantrip. Once you reach 3rd level, you can cast the create or destroy water spell once with this trait as a 1st-level spell. Constitution is your spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Natural Athlete
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Athletics skill.

traits.name: Stone's Endurance
traits.description: When you take damage, you can use your reaction to roll a d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled, and reduce the damage by that total. You regain this trait on a short or long rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

traits.name: Mountain Born
traits.description: You're acclimated to high altitude, including elevations above 20,000 feet. You're also naturally adapted to cold climates.

traits.name: Claws
traits.description: Your claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit, you deal slashing damage equal to 1d4 + Strength modifier.

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.description: You can hold your breath for up to 1 hour at a time.

traits.name: Natural Armor
traits.description: Your shell provides you a base AC of 17 (your Dex modifier doesn't affect it). You can't wear armor, but scudi apply normally.

traits.name: Shell Defense
traits.description: You can withdraw into your shell as an action. Until you emerge, you gain a +4 bonus to AC, and you have advantage on Strength and Constitution saving throws. You are prone, your speed is 0 and can't increase, and you can't take reactions.

traits.name: Survival Instinct
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Survival skill.

traits.name: Fey
traits.description: Your creature type is fey, rather than humanoid.

traits.name: Charge
traits.description: If you move at least 30 feet straight toward a target and then hit it with a melee weapon attack, you can immediately make one hooves attack as a bonus action.

traits.name: Hooves
traits.description: Your hooves are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes dealing 1d6 + STR bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Equine Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger for carrying, pushing, dragging. Any climb that requires hands/feet costs you 4 extra feet of movement per foot climbed.

traits.name: Survivor
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one of: Animal Handling, Medicine, Nature, or Survival.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining carrying capacity.

traits.name: Loxodon Serenity
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.

traits.name: Natural Armor
traits.description: Your thick, leathery hide gives you AC of 12 + CON modifier. Shield bonuses apply as normal.

traits.name: Trunk
traits.description: You can grasp things with your trunk, using it to reach up to 5 feet, lift, pull, or carry. It cannot wield weapons or shields.

traits.name: Keen Smell
traits.description: You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception), Wisdom (Survival), and Intelligence (Investigation) checks that involve smell.

traits.name: Horns
traits.description: Your horns are natural weapons, dealing 1d6 + STR piercing damage on unarmed strikes.

traits.name: Goring Rush
traits.description: Immediately after you take the Dash action and move at least 20 feet, you can make one horns attack as a bonus action.

traits.name: Hammering Horns
traits.description: Immediately after you hit a creature with a melee attack on your turn, you can use a bonus action to attempt to shove that target up to 10 feet (Strength save vs 8 + Strength mod + Prof).

traits.name: Imposing Presence
traits.description: You have proficiency in either the Intimidation or Persuasion skill.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Animal Enhancement (Lvl 1)
traits.description: Choose one: Manta Glide (slow falls), Nimble Climber (climb speed equal to walk), or Underwater Adaptation (swim speed 30 and breathe air and water).

traits.name: Animal Enhancement (Lvl 5)
traits.description: Choose one at level 5: Grappling Appendages (claws/tentacles to grapple as a bonus action, 1d6 damage), Carapace (+1 AC when not wearing heavy armor), or Acid Spray (acid spit 2d10 damage once per rest).

traits.name: Vedalken Dispassion
traits.description: You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Tireless Precision
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill and one tool. When making checks with them, roll an extra d4 and add it to the total.

traits.name: Partially Amphibious
traits.description: By absorbing oxygen through your skin, you can breathe underwater for up to 1 hour.

traits.name: Shapechanger
traits.description: As an action, you can change your appearance and voice. You can't duplicate a creature you've never seen, and you revert to your natural form if you die.

traits.name: Changeling Instincts
traits.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice from Deception, Insight, Intimidation, and Performance.

traits.name: Dual Mind
traits.description: When you make a Wisdom saving throw, you can use your reaction to gain advantage on the roll.

traits.name: Mental Discipline
traits.description: You have resistance to psychic damage.

traits.name: Mind Link
traits.description: You can speak telepathically to any creature you can see within 60 feet of you. They don't need to share a language with you.

traits.name: Severed from Dreams
traits.description: Kalashtar are immune to magical spells and effects that require you to dream (like the dream spell), but they do not dream naturally.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 60 feet.

traits.name: Shifting
traits.description: As a bonus action, you can assume a more bestial appearance. This shift lasts for 1 minute or until you end it. You gain temporary HP equal to your level + CON modifier. You also gain a subrace-specific benefit.

traits.name: Tough
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Athletics skill.

traits.name: Shifting Feature
traits.description: While shifted, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and an additional 1d6 temporary hit points.

traits.name: Fierce
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

traits.name: Shifting Feature
traits.description: While shifted, you can use a bonus action to make a bite attack dealing 1d6 + STR modifier piercing damage.

traits.name: Graceful
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Acrobatics skill.

traits.name: Swift
traits.description: Your walking speed is increased by 5 feet.

traits.name: Shifting Feature
traits.description: While shifted, your walking speed is increased by an additional 5 feet. You can move up to 10 feet as a reaction when an enemy ends its turn within 5 feet of you without provoking opportunity attacks.

traits.name: Natural Tracker
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Survival skill.

traits.name: Shifting Feature
traits.description: While shifted, you have advantage on all Wisdom checks, and no creature within 30 feet can make attack rolls with advantage against you.

traits.name: Construct Resilience
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being poisoned, and you have resistance to poison damage. You don't need to eat, drink, or breathe, and are immune to disease.

traits.name: Sentry's Rest
traits.description: When you take a long rest, you must spend at least six hours in an inactive, motionless state. In this state, you appear inert, but it doesn't render you unconscious.

traits.name: Integrated Protection
traits.description: You gain a +1 bonus to AC. To don armor, you must incorporate it into your body over the course of 1 hour, and you cannot have it removed against your will.

traits.name: Tireless
traits.description: You do not suffer exhaustion from lack of sleep.

traits.name: Specialized Design
traits.description: You gain one skill proficiency, one tool proficiency, and fluency in one language of your choice.

traits.name: Integrated Tool
traits.description: Choose one tool you are proficient with. This tool is integrated into your body, and you add double your proficiency bonus to any ability checks you make with it.

traits.name: Iron Fists
traits.description: When you make an unarmed strike, you can deal 1d4 + STR modifier bludgeoning damage instead of the normal damage.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining carrying capacity.

traits.name: Swift
traits.description: Your walking speed is increased by 5 feet.

traits.name: Light Step
traits.description: When you are traveling alone for an extended period of time (one hour or more), you can move stealthily at a normal pace.

traits.name: Feat
traits.description: You gain one feat of your choice for which you qualify.

traits.name: Variable Trait
traits.description: You gain one of the following options of your choice: (a) darkvision with a range of 60 feet or (b) proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Decadent Mastery
traits.description: You learn one language of your choice, and you are proficient with one skill or tool of your choice.

traits.name: Martial Prodigy
traits.description: You are proficient with light and medium armor, and with shortswords, longswords, and greatswords.

traits.name: Githyanki Psionics
traits.description: You know the mage hand cantrip. Level 3: jump (1/day). Level 5: misty step (1/day). Intelligence is your spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Mental Discipline
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against the charmed and frightened conditions.

traits.name: Githzerai Psionics
traits.description: You know the mage hand cantrip (hand is invisible). Level 3: shield (1/day). Level 5: detect thoughts (1/day). Wisdom is your spellcasting ability.

Dhampir.name: Dhampir
Dhampir.source: Van Richten's Guide to Ravenloft / D&D Beyond

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 60 feet.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.description: You gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed. Starting at 3rd level, you can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving your hands free.

traits.name: Vampiric Bite
traits.description: Your fanged bite is a natural weapon. Deals 1d4 piercing damage. On hit, if you have less than half HP, you can heal or gain bonus to next check.

Hexblood.name: Hexblood
Hexblood.source: Van Richten's Guide to Ravenloft / D&D Beyond

traits.name: Fey Type
traits.description: Your creature type is fey, rather than humanoid.

traits.name: Eerie Token
traits.description: You can harmlessly pull out a fingernail, tooth, or lock of hair to create a magical token to telepathically communicate or see through up to 10 miles away.

traits.name: Hex Magic
traits.description: You know the disguise self and hex spells. You can cast each once per long rest without a spell slot.

Reborn.name: Reborn
Reborn.source: Van Richten's Guide to Ravenloft / D&D Beyond

traits.name: Deathless Nature
traits.description: Advantage on death saves, advantage vs poison, resistance to poison damage. You don't need to eat, drink, breathe, or sleep, and magic cannot put you to sleep.

traits.name: Knowledge from a Past Life
traits.description: When you make an ability check that uses a skill, you can add a d6 to the roll (uses equal to proficiency bonus per long rest).

Owlin.name: Owlin
Owlin.source: Strixhaven: A Curriculum of Chaos / D&D Beyond

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 120 feet.

traits.name: Flight
traits.description: You have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You cannot use this flight while wearing medium or heavy armor.

traits.name: Silent Feathers
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Stealth skill.

Leonin.name: Leonin
Leonin.source: Mythic Odysseys of Theros / D&D Beyond

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Superior vision in dark and dim conditions out to 60 feet.

traits.name: Claws
traits.description: Your claws deal 1d4 + Strength slashing damage on unarmed strikes.

traits.name: Hunter's Instincts
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one of: Athletics, Intimidation, Perception, or Survival.

traits.name: Daunting Roar
traits.description: As a bonus action, let out a terrifying roar. Each creature within 10 feet must make a Wis save (DC = 8 + CON mod + Prof) or be frightened of you until the end of your next turn (1/short rest).

Satyr.name: Satyr
Satyr.source: Mythic Odysseys of Theros / D&D Beyond

traits.name: Fey Type
traits.description: Your creature type is fey, rather than humanoid.

traits.name: Ram
traits.description: Your head/horns are natural weapons, dealing 1d6 + STR bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Mirthful Leaps
traits.description: Whenever you make a long or high jump, roll a d8 and add the number rolled to the distance in feet.

traits.name: Reveler
traits.description: You gain proficiency in Performance and Persuasion, and with one musical instrument of choice.

traits.name: Natural Armor
traits.description: Your tough skin gives you a base AC of 12 + DEX modifier.

traits.name: Leviathan Will
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, stunned, or put to sleep.

traits.name: Observant & Athletic
traits.description: You gain proficiency in Athletics and Perception.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
traits.description: You can breathe air and water, but you must be submerged in water at least once every 4 hours or suffocate.

traits.name: Arboreal Alertness
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: You can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Poison Immunity
traits.description: You are immune to poison damage and the poisoned condition.

traits.name: Poisonous Skin
traits.description: Any creature that touches you or hits you with an unarmed strike must succeed on a DC 12 Con save or be poisoned for 1 minute. You can apply poison to your piercing weapons.

traits.name: Standing Leap
traits.description: Your long jump is up to 25 feet and your high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

traits.name: Water Dependency
traits.description: If you fail to immerse yourself in water for at least 1 hour during a day, you suffer one level of exhaustion at the end of that day.
